memoryArtifacts.headline: Thomas, Son of Thomas Hurlbut
memoryArtifacts.description: He learned the blacksmith trade from his father and followed him in business. He gave him land at the Common, with the condition that he should carry on the blacksmith trade. In 1673 he bought Thomas …

popularStory.description:

Lion Gardiner was an Englishman, and by profession …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hurlbut於1610年3月10日出生在英國維爾爾其朋納姆時，他的父親Richard Hurlbut Jr35歲，母親Anne Bower32歲。他於1639年與Sarah Elizabeth Nye在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可。他在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德被列為blacksmith。他去世於1671年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年61歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Hurlbut于1610年3月10日出生在英国維爾爾其朋納姆时，他的父亲Richard Hurlbut Jr35岁，母亲Anne Bower32岁。他于1639年与Sarah Elizabeth Nye在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1637年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦賽布盧可。他在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德被列为blacksmith。他去世于1671年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年61岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hurlbut
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from a medieval game called hurlebatte, which took its name from ‘short battes of a cubit long and a halfe, with pykes of yron, and were tied to a line, that when they were throwne, one might plucke them again’ (1565–73). Compare ‘Pleying at The two hande swerd, at swerd and bokelere, and at two pyked staf, at The hurlebatte’ (about 1450 in MED).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hurlbut was born on 10 March 1610, in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, his father, Richard Hurlbut Jr, was 35 and his mother, Anne Bower, was 32. He married Sarah Elizabeth Nye in 1639, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1637. His occupation is listed as blacksmith in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States. He died on 12 October 1671, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 61, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Hurlbut est né le 10 mars 1610, à Chippenham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Hurlbut Jr, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anne Bower, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Elizabeth Nye en 1639, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1637. Sa profession de son indiquée est blacksmith à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1671, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Hurlbut am 10. März 1610 in Chippenham, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Hurlbut Jr 35 und seine Mutter Anne Bower 32. Er hat 1639 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Elizabeth Nye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1637 hat er in Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. sein Beruf ist als blacksmith in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1671 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hurlbut è nato il il 10 marzo 1610 nel Chippenham, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Hurlbut Jr, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Anne Bower, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Elizabeth Nye nel 1639, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1637. La sua occupazione è indicata come blacksmith nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 12 ottobre 1671, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hurlbutが1610年3月10日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチップエンハムで生まれた時，父Richard Hurlbut Jrは35歳，母Anne Bowerは32歳であった。1639年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでSarah Elizabeth Nyeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1637年にはイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンサイブルークに住んでいた。アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでの職業はblacksmithと記録されている。彼は1671年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで61歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hurlbut(이)가 1610년 3월 10일 영국 윌츠히르 치펜함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Hurlbut Jr(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Bower(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1639년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Sarah Elizabeth Nye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1637년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 지브룩에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 blacksmith이었다. 그는 1671년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Hurlbut nasceu em 10 de março de 1610, em Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Hurlbut Jr, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anne Bower, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Elizabeth Nye em 1639, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Saybrook, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1637. Sua profissão aparece como blacksmith em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1671, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Hurlbut родился 10 марта 1610 г. в местности чиппенам, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Hurlbut Jr было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Bower, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Elizabeth Nye в 1639 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности сеибрук, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1637 году.  Он работал по профессии blacksmith в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 12 октября 1671 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Hurlbut nació el 10 de marzo de 1610, en Chippenham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Hurlbut Jr, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anne Bower, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sarah Elizabeth Nye en 1639, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Saybrook, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1637. Su ocupación registrada era blacksmith en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1671, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
